question.label: Safe execution
question.name: You said 'being safe' — what does that look like in practice?
question.description: Drills into the specific behaviour behind his 'safe' pattern before moving on.

answer: I probably should ask for sharper feedback earlier than I do.

assessment.note: He names a specific growth-limiting behaviour — delaying sharper feedback — which signals mild underuse of stretch; no clear wellbeing signal.

new_queue.label: Sharper feedback
new_queue.name: Sharper feedback earlier — what stops you doing that in the moment?

new_queue.label: Early alignment
new_queue.name: What do you usually want to have settled before you bring others in?

new_queue.label: Commitment closer
new_queue.name: What will you do differently on early alignment before we next meet?

issues: coverage: injected wellbeing into next question (0 touches after turn 5)

history.answer_excerpt: I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.

I have mostly stayed in my lane instead of forcing cross-team decisions.
I have made a few calls independently, but I still over-index on being safe.
